stable.changelog:
- Fix include and exclude video option not provide patch in dialog correctly
- Fix SD card mount in folder patch and explore mode
- Fix search SecurityException error on query
- Fix ask access media permission in external media viewer
- Update monet themes colors
- Update icons
- General UI improvements
- Small fixes and changes
